column2: Signup, Sign in, Reset Password, Logout, Camera, Settings

column3: Enter a new valid username, a new valid email address, and a valid password.
column4: 1. Need that the username and email are not used before
column5: 1. Enter username, 2. Enter email address, 3. Enter password, 4. Click 'Sign up' button

column3: Enter a new valid username, a valid password, and an invalid email address.
column4: 1. Need that the email and username are not used before
column5: 1. Enter username, 2. Enter email address, 3. Enter password, 4. Click 'Sign up' button
column7: A message 'Invalid email format' is shown
column9: A message 'Invalid email format' is shown

column3: Enter a valid email address and a valid password.
column4: 1. User account must already be created and active
column5: 1. Enter email address, 2. Enter password, 3. Click 'Sign in' button

column3: Enter a valid registered email address to reset password.
column4: 1. User must have an existing account
column5: 1. Click 'Forgot Password', 2. Enter email address, 3. Click 'Reset Password' button
column7: A message 'Password reset link sent to your email' is shown
column9: A message 'Password reset link sent to your email' is shown

column3: Click on the log out button from the application.
column4: 1. User must be currently logged in
column5: 1. Navigate to Settings/Profile menu, 2. Click 'Log out' button
column7: User is logged out and Login page is shown
column9: User is logged out and Login page is shown

column3: Use the camera to successfully capture a photo.
column4: 1. App must have been granted Camera permissions
column5: 1. Open camera feature, 2. Click 'Capture Photo' button, 3. Confirm the photo
column7: Photo is captured successfully and saved/displayed
column9: Photo is captured successfully and saved/displayed

column3: Toggle the application language from English to Arabic.
column4: 1. App is currently set to English
column5: 1. Navigate to Settings menu, 2. Tap on 'Language Toggle' to select Arabic
column7: Application text updates immediately to Arabic
column9: Application text updates immediately to Arabic
